landing.title: Scrape every business in the MENA region
landing.subtitle: Pick a country, pick a region, pick your industry. We stream every Google Maps listing straight into a clean Excel.
landing.featuresTitle: Built for cold outreach at scale
landing.feature1Body: Egypt, KSA, UAE, Kuwait, Qatar, Bahrain, Oman, Jordan, Lebanon, Iraq, Syria, Palestine, Yemen, Libya, Tunisia, Algeria, Morocco, Sudan.
landing.feature2Body: See leads land in the table as we walk each region. Cancel any time, keep everything found so far.
landing.feature3Body: One sheet per region + a combined tab. Ready for your CRM, dialer, or WhatsApp cadence.

hero.title: Scrape any industry across MENA
hero.subtitle: Choose a country, pick regions, download a clean Excel of every business Google knows.

form.industryPh: e.g. speech therapy centers, dental clinics, gyms
form.warn: Large scrape — this may take several minutes and consume Google Places quota.
